summary: W915 keeps the target nonterminal under the immutable original four-task contract while replacing W914's TargetDifferenceSurjectiveForTargetProviderW713 and TargetCodomainCompactSpaceProviderW601 abbrev-typed fields with raw target propositions. It reconstructs the W914 assumptions through targetDifferenceSurjectiveForTargetOfRawFieldW915 and targetCodomainCompactSpaceProviderOfRawFieldW915, then routes through W914 into the stable ExactAt construction. Product success remains false because the route fields are not yet instantiated and the original four-task completion witness and review packet are still incomplete.
known_gaps: Task 4 is not contract-complete under the original four-task contract: W915 exposes the target-only surjectivity and target-codomain compactness providers as raw target propositions, but the remaining W915 concrete leaves are still not instantiated.

W915 is still a closed-map branch route. The W898 closed-embedding endpoint-homology-free branch remains separately available; no no-argument branch choice or final original-four-task witness has been constructed.

The remaining W915 fields include the boundary fields, relation fields, raw target surjectivity and compactness propositions, raw selected-difference pi1/pi2/pi3 projection closed-map propositions, the raw mapped explicit cokernel IsClosedMap field, strict preimage object and map fields, identity and composition coherence, source-image normalization, raw fixed-target uniqueness quantifier fields, source pretriangulated/triangulated/triangle-completion fields, endpoint closed-embedding/open-map/ExactAt-to-epi facts, and bounded-homotopy localized right-adjoint fields.
The final Dbounded MetrizableLCA original four-task completion witness is still missing; ProductSuccessDeclarations and OriginalFourTaskCompletionDeclarations only record nonterminal route evidence.
The completion review packet still lacks the immutable-contract negative-fixture coverage, external SHA256 sidecar, and clean extraction audit required for product success.
remaining_work: Construct or precisely block concrete values for the thirty-nine W915 closed-map target-raw-fields selected-difference-fields explicit inputs.

Choose the next smallest contract-closing increment from source-image normalization, strict-preimage coherence consolidation, relation fields, boundary fields, branch selection, or another supported concrete provider boundary.
Connect a real no-argument route to the original four-task completion witness only after all route inputs are real rather than merely exposed as fields.
Refresh the completion review packet, negative fixtures, manifest, clean extraction audit, and terminal outcome only after the original witness exists.
